tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]Tabbed by: tsulli12
E-mail: sullisports12@aol.com
Ridin' Solo by Jason Derulo[/tab]


The chords used throughout the whole song are E-Bm7-Asus4/G-Asus2

[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]Asus2[/ch]
e|-0----2-----0------0---|
B|-0----3-----3------0---|
G|-1----2-----2------2---|
D|-2----4-----0------2---|
A|-2----2-----0------0---|
E|-0----x-----x------x---|[/tab]


Yeeeeeyeeeah, yeah, yeah, yeah,

[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'm feeling like a star, you can't stop my shine,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dsus2[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'm loving cloud nine, my head's in the sky,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'm solo, I'm riding solo,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'm riding solo, I'm ridin solo, sooloooo[/tab]


The chorus and the verses use the same chords.
